name: xcode-canvas-web-vscode
description: Open the local Xcode Canvas Web simulator inside VS Code.

commands.title: Xcode Canvas Web: Open Simulator View
Xcode Canvas Web: Stop Managed Server

xcodeCanvasWeb.serverUrl.description: URL loaded inside the simulator webview.

xcodeCanvasWeb.cliPath.description: Optional path to the xcode-canvas-web CLI. When empty, the extension first checks the workspace build and then falls back to PATH.

xcodeCanvasWeb.port.description: Port used when the extension auto-starts the local server.

xcodeCanvasWeb.bindAddress.description: Bind address used when the extension auto-starts the local server.

xcodeCanvasWeb.autoStartServer.description: Start the local server automatically when opening the simulator view if the server is not already reachable.
